response.overview: 'AS' follows the journey of Luciano, a troubled, young, Cape coloured man as he navigates the harsh realities of life in a marginalised South African community, known as the Cape Flats. Mourning his mother's sudden death, he is haunted by his childhood memories. Consequently, drawn into a cycle of addiction and poverty, aggravated by the lack of parental guidance and support.
response.title: AS
